description: Bidirectional mapping between N5 hashtags and Howie V-OS brackets
changes: v2.0.0: Fixed semantic collision - Priority is now N5-only (binary: critical/non-critical)
v2.0.0: Added disambiguation hints for [LD-NET] → collaboration vs channel
v2.0.0: Updated auto-inheritance rules per V's confirmation

[LD-NET].description: Default to collaboration partner unless context suggests channel
[LD-NET].fallback: If ambiguous, default to collaboration and flag for manual review

n5_only_tags.description: Tags that exist only in N5, not synced to Howie
n5_only_tags.note: Priority is now N5-only (binary: critical/non-critical). Accommodation is Howie-synced (meeting flexibility).

auto_inheritance_rules.description: Tags that are automatically added when a primary tag is applied or confirmed

#stakeholder:investor.reason: All investors are business-critical by definition

#stakeholder:customer.reason: Paying customers are critical to business

#stakeholder:partner:collaboration.reason: Priority depends on specific partnership value

#stakeholder:partner:channel.reason: Priority depends on channel reach and value

#stakeholder:job_seeker.reason: Recruiting is important but not business-critical

#stakeholder:community.reason: Community relationships are valuable but not urgent

#stakeholder:prospect.reason: General leads start as exploratory, elevate as needed

#stakeholder:vendor.reason: Service providers are operational, not strategic

discovery_tag_logic.when_to_apply: At tag time or after first meeting

signals.from_email: Check email subject/body for keywords: intro, introduction, coffee, meet, explore, discuss
signals.from_linkedin: Check LinkedIn message for introduction context
signals.from_calendar: First meeting with this contact (no prior meetings)

discovery_tag_logic.fallback: If ambiguous, do not auto-add; suggest for V's review

linkedin_protocol.description: Protocol for accessing LinkedIn messages when no email exists
never_do: Write to them in any way
always_do: Mark conversation as UNREAD after reading
Note: V uses 'unread' status to track if he's responded yet
linkedin_protocol.use_case: Discover meetings set up via LinkedIn DMs when no Gmail thread exists

careerspan_context.business_model: B2B SaaS platform for career development and coaching

channel_vs_collaboration.collaboration: Companies building on/with Careerspan (APIs, integrations, co-marketing)
channel_vs_collaboration.channel: Organizations reselling or referring Careerspan to their audience
